summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of CLIENT PORTAL ONLY (12 test scenarios, 100% pass rate). All client-facing pages tested: Home, Sessions, Progress, Programs, Messages, Waiver, Packages. Verified booking request flow, message sending, role guard, logout, signup rejection, and mobile responsive design with bottom tab navigation. Backend was NOT retested per instructions (already 96.6% success from iteration 1).
passed_tests: Login as client (client.demo@corevaluefitness.com) - redirects to /client home
Client Home: next session card renders with data (Tomorrow 9:00 AM with Marcus Rivera)
Client Home: credits balance tile shows 6 credits
Client Home: recent messages card renders with coach/client conversation
Client Home: waiver alert card present and links to /client/waiver (Sarah needs to sign v2)
Client Sessions: upcoming and past sections render correctly
Client Sessions: past sessions show 1 shared coach note
Client Sessions: booking request flow - drawer opens, form fills, submits successfully, pending request row appears
Client Progress: 3 metric cards with line charts render (Body Weight, Back Squat 1RM, Mile Time)
Client Programs: 'Foundation Strength - Phase 1' renders with 5 numbered exercises, sets x reps badges, 3 'Watch demo video' links with target='_blank'
Client Messages: conversation renders (2 coach messages, 1 client message), send message works and appears in thread
Client Waiver: unsigned state shows full waiver text in scroll area, signature form elements present (input, checkbox, submit), signature history shows v1 signature

Client Packages: credits balance shows 6 credits, 'payments not configured' dashed card visible (EXPECTED), Buy buttons DISABLED (EXPECTED - Stripe not configured), payment history shows 1 manual payment (Starter Pack)
Role guard: navigating to /coach while logged in as client redirects back to /client
Logout: user menu logout button works and redirects to /login
Signup rejection: random email (nobody12345@nowhere.test) shows friendly error 'We couldn't find an invitation for this email. Please contact your coach to get set up.'
Mobile viewport (390x844): bottom tab navigation renders with 5 tabs (Home, Sessions, Progress, Programs, Messages), all tabs navigate correctly
